calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petitioners Petition To Confirm Contractual Arb Award
Off Calendar Dec-10-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling on PETITIONERS KIRSTYN HAIRSTON, THE ESTATE OF JASON HAIRSTON's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is adopted as follows:

Petitioners Kirstyn Hairston and the Estate of Jason Hairston's petition to confirm contractual arbitration award is granted. No opposition filed.

The Court signed the proposed order and proposed judgment that were submitted by email pursuant to the tentative ruling.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
